note:
{
  "experiment_overview": "The experiment aims to create sub-50nm nanofluidic junctions in PDMS microfluidic chips using a self-assembly process of colloidal particles. The goal is to fabricate a tunable nanoporous membrane for concentration experiments involving DNA and protein samples.",

    "Spin coating of photoresist and photolithography",
    "Shallow dry etching of 700 nm deep nanochannels",
    "Deep dry etching of 20 μm deep microchannels",
    "Colloidal self-assembly of 300 nm silica beads",
    "Electrokinetic concentration of DNA with a 300 nm bead membrane"
  ],
